About Us

UNIQUE, SAVORY, HIGH QUALITY BLESSINGS MADE JUST FOR YOU. EACH MEAL IS A CELEBRATION ON ITS OWN.

About Us

Welcome to SukhoThai. This unique name pays homage to the first kingdom of Thailand. It was in essence the birthplace of Thai art, language, architecture and cuisine. The meaning of the name is The Dawn of Happiness.

Dining at SukhoThai, you will enjoy our rustic inspired, Thai ambiance paired with our delectable and expertly prepared cuisines. Out picturesque dishes, designed by Thai culinary experts are crafted, using the finest ingredients that are certain to impress both, the pallet and the eye.

As a long time restauranteur, it is my hope that you will enjoy a unique and special dining experience.

May SukhoThai bring you happiness, comfort and most importantly, wellness.

Very fresh tasting food. Menu is slightly different from what you see at normal Thai spots. I highly recommend the larb, it's the best version that I've ever had. That said, I've never had a bad dish or experience here. Also very easy for pick up and to

Matthew B.

North Park, San Diego, CA (1/23/2020)

They have always been a favorite. Their food is clean and light, never super oily and the ingredients are so well picked. I love their salmon dishes and the beautiful red rice they serve. They have always done To go food well and have continued doing a wo

Nina K.

San Diego, CA (10/22/2020)

This is my all time favorite Thai food place, that continues to top my fav restaurant list! Delicious food with awesome vegan options, a friendly staff, and reasonable prices. Can't go wrong here

Ashley G.

San Diego, CA (11/19/2020)

I absolutely love this Thai place! and I'm super picky about my Thai food considering it's my favorite food. The service is great and the restaurant itself is a super cute scene!!

Kayla S.

San Diego, CA (3/3/2020)

Truly the best Thai food in San Diego. I've tried them all and this place is consistently delicious, hot, customize-able and quick. The staff is always friendly and accommodating too. I HIGHLY recommend their yellow or red curry with rice noodles!

Jessica H.

San Diego, CA (1/11/2019)
